review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI re-review confirmed the prior P2 generation-command enforcement gap is fixed. The validator now enforces M07 command-matrix generation exclusion, no-real-data attestation, H00 subset mapping, exit_code 0 evidence, actual Claude metadata, and construction inspection requirements without claiming all M07 or RP00 completion.

findings.title: Prior P2 generation-command enforcement gap is fixed and non-regressive
findings.details: The previously declarative-only exclusion is now machine-enforced against M07 command-matrix closeouts and was cross-checked against the production_ready M07.S01 evidence.

findings.title: Generation-exclusion enforcement covers only the 4 enumerated scripts
findings.details: The current exclusion loop uses the explicit S01 excluded_mutating_or_generation_commands list. Additional package generation scripts are outside that list.
findings.recommendation: At RP00.P00.M07.S03, add a broader generation-command pattern or expand the excluded list for defense in depth.

findings.title: No-real-data attestation relies on brittle substring matching
findings.details: The current attestation check looks for canonical note substrings. Current evidence passes, but a structured boolean would be less brittle.
findings.recommendation: At RP00.P00.M07.S03, add a structured no_real_data boolean to command evidence and validate it.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI re-review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. The initial P2 was fixed before this final re-review. Remaining P3 hardening notes are deferred to RP00.P00.M07.S03.
